accessibility.alt_text: A deterministic diagram of the 428-byte synthetic GGUF file showing header and metadata bytes, aligned tensor data, and the bounded demo.matrix and demo.vector payload ranges.

technical_claims.claim: The synthetic teaching fixture separates GGUF metadata and tensor payload ranges using deterministic offsets and alignment.

licensing.input_license_notes: Project-owned synthetic fixture and deterministic rendering inputs only.

human_review.notes: The generated SVG was replayed from the golden JSON and its input hash, output hash, output size, accessibility metadata, and evidence boundary were verified by focused tests. Independent domain review remains required before publication claims rely on the figure.
